chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1586 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For katcha peshi. 21.11.2016. Mr. Balmiyo, Advocate alongwith petitioners. Mr. Anwar H. Ansari, State Counsel a/w ASI Muhammad Ashraf of P.S Airport, Shaheed Benazirabad. Respondents No.5 to 9 are present in person. = The private respondents are present in person and submit that they have not caused any harassment to the petitioners and according to them the petitioners have contracted a secret marriage in complete violation of their family norms and traditions, yet they have undertaken not to cause any harassment to them. The police officials have also filed their parawise comments in which it has been mentioned that they will discharge their functions in accordance with law. The present petition is disposed of with the directions that no harassment should be caused to the petitioners and that the official respondents shall conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law and will provide protection to the petitioners if they are approached with such a request. JUDGE Shahid
